200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Archer

Event: Summer Festival 2025

Event date: 01/06/2025

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while the Forest Guardian fires frost arrows at random enemies every 0,5 sec for 3 sec. The arrows deal physical damage equal to 200% of the Forest Guardian's attack and have a 30% chance to freeze their targets for 1 sec. The frozen targets can't move or attack. It also increases the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 1 sec.

description 4/6

Once in a while the Forest Guardian fires frost arrows at random enemies every 0,5 sec for 4 sec. The arrows deal physical damage equal to 300% of the Forest Guardian's attack and have a 30% chance to freeze their targets for 1,5 sec. The frozen targets can't move or attack. It also increases the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 1,5 sec. Throughout the battle, if the Forest Guardian or any allied unit is frozen, they take 25% less damage. All frozen enemy units take 25% more damage for the duration of the battle. When any enemy unit is frozen, the Forest Guardian steals 15% of all stats from them for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

description 6/6

Once in a while the Forest Guardian fires frost arrows at random enemies every 0,5 sec for 5 sec. The arrows deal physical damage equal to 400% of the Forest Guardian's attack and have a 30% chance to freeze their targets for 2 sec. The frozen targets can't move or attack. It also increases the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 2 sec. Throughout the battle, if the Forest Guardian or any allied unit is frozen, they take 35% less damage. All frozen enemy units take 35% more damage for the duration of the battle. When any enemy unit is frozen, the Forest Guardian steals 20% of all stats from them for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. Once in a while the Forest Guardian unleashes an icy vortex on the field. When the vortex passes through an enemy unit, they have the following effects applied to them: - The unit gains a frost mark for 5 sec. If the health of a marked unit drops below 15%, it instantly kills them. - The unit has stiffness applied to them, and they can't recover health for 5 sec. The stiffened units' attack speed is reduced by 35% for 5 sec. - The unit takes 650000 magic damage and can't gain positive effects for 5 sec. - The unit has a 65% chance to be frozen for 3 sec. The unit can't move or attack for the duration. The cooldown of the target's fear and artifact abilities is also increased by 3 sec. - If the vortex passes through a frozen enemy unit, they additionally take 400000 pure damage.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

Each frost arrow deals an extra 175000 magic damage.

description 4/6

Each frost arrow deals an extra 175000 magic damage. The Forest Guardian deals 350000 physical damage to all frozen units every second for the duration of the battle.

description 6/6

Each frost arrow deals an extra 175000 magic damage. The Forest Guardian deals 350000 physical damage to all frozen units every second for the duration of the battle. When an icy vortex passes through a frozen enemy unit, it deals pure damage equal to 10% of their max health to them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

The Forest Guardian recovers health equal to 150% of the damage dealt by frost arrows.

description 4/6

The Forest Guardian recovers health equal to 150% of the damage dealt by frost arrows. When the Forest Guardian or any allied unit is frozen, the Forest Guardian and all allied units are healed for 10%. The ability can be triggered only once in 3 sec.

description 6/6

The Forest Guardian recovers health equal to 150% of the damage dealt by frost arrows. When the Forest Guardian or any allied unit is frozen, the Forest Guardian and all allied units are healed for 10%. The ability can be triggered only once in 3 sec. When the Forest Guardian unleashes an icy vortex, they also apply infusion to themselves and to all allied units. Infused unit recovers 150000 health; their damage, crit, and physical armor piercing are increased by 40% for 3 sec.; their incoming damage is reduced by 30% for 3 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

Enemy units hit by a frost arrow have their physical and magic armor reduced by 35% for 3 sec.

description 4/6

Enemy units hit by a frost arrow have their physical and magic armor reduced by 35% for 3 sec. When an enemy unit is frozen, the Forest Guardian removes 2 random positive effects from all frozen enemy units. The ability can be triggered only once in 3 sec.

description 6/6

Enemy units hit by a frost arrow have their physical and magic armor reduced by 35% for 3 sec. When an enemy unit is frozen, the Forest Guardian removes 2 random positive effects from all frozen enemy units. The ability can be triggered only once in 3 sec. When an enemy with a frost mark dies, the Forest Guardian freezes 3 random enemy units for 3 sec. The frozen units can't move or attack for the duration. It also increases the cooldown of the targets' gear and artifact abilities by 3 sec.

Materials

Emblem of Archer Order
Leather Strap
Wrapping Rope
Comfortable Sleeves
Beautiful Lock
Suggested gears for the set
